subcodes.first_line: O thou whom God hath loved and whom I love with all my heart, let there be no sorrow, perplexity, regret or spiritual deprivation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من احبه الله و احبه من کل قلبی احزان و پریشانی و حسرت و حرمان روحانی نه
subcodes.subjects: @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @martyrs and martyrdom
